admin_password.description: The Password which should be used for the local-administrator on this Virtual Machine.

admin_username.description: The Username which should be used for the local-administrator on this Virtual Machine.

name.description: The name of the Windows Virtual Machine. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

network_interface_ids.description: A list of Network Interface IDs which should be attached to this Virtual Machine. The first Network Interface ID in this list will be the Primary Network Interface on the Virtual Machine.

size.description: The SKU which should be used for this Virtual Machine, such as Standard_F2.

os_disk.type: list(object({caching: string, storage_account_type: string, diff_disk_settings: list(object({option: string, placement: string})), disk_encryption_set_id: string, disk_size_gb: number, name: string, secure_vm_disk_encryption_set_id: string, security_encryption_type: string, write_accelerator_enabled: bool}))

allow_extension_operations.description: Should Extension Operations be allowed on this Virtual Machine?

availability_set_id.description: Specifies the ID of the Availability Set in which the Virtual Machine should exist.

bypass_platform_safety_checks_on_user_sc.description: Specifies whether to skip platform scheduled patching when a user schedule is associated with the VM.

capacity_reservation_group_id.description: Specifies the ID of the Capacity Reservation Group which the Virtual Machine should be allocated to.

computer_name.description: Specifies the Hostname which should be used for this Virtual Machine. If unspecified this defaults to the value for the `Name` field. If the value of the `Name` field is not a valid `Computer Name`, then you must specify `Computer Name`.

custom_date.description: The Base64-Encoded Custom Data which should be used for this Virtual Machine.

dedicated_host_id.description: The ID of a Dedicated Host where this machine should be run on. Conflicts with `Dedicated Host Group ID`.

dedicated_host_group_id.description: The ID of a Dedicated Host Group where this machine should be run on. Conflicts with `Dedicated Host ID`.

edge_zone.description: Specifies the Edge Zone within the Azure Region where this Windows Virtual Machine should exist.

disk_controller_type.description: Specifies the Disk Controller Type used for this Virtual Machine.

enable_automatic_updates.description: Specifies if Automatic Updates are Enabled for the Windows Virtual Machine. Changing this forces a new resource to be created.

encryption_at_host_enabled.description: Should all of the disks (including the temp disk) attached to this Virtual Machine be encrypted by enabling Encryption at Host?

eviction_policy.description: Specifies what should happen when the Virtual Machine is evicted for price reasons when using a Spot instance.

extensions_time_budget.description: Specifies the duration allocated for all extensions to start. The time duration should be between 15 minutes and 120 minutes (inclusive) and should be specified in ISO 8601 format.

gallery_application.type: list(object({version_id: string, automatic_upgrade_enabled: bool, configuration_blob_uri: string, order: number, tag: string, treat_failure_as_deployment_failure_enabled: bool}))

hotpatching_enabled.description: Should the VM be patched without requiring a reboot?

license_type.description: Specifies the type of on-premise license (also known as Azure Hybrid Use Benefit) which should be used for this Virtual Machine.

max_bid_price.description: The maximum price you're willing to pay for this Virtual Machine, in US Dollars; which must be greater than the current spot price. If this bid price falls below the current spot price the Virtual Machine will be evicted using the `Eviction Policy`. Defaults to -1, which means that the Virtual Machine should not be evicted for price reasons.

patch_assessment_mode.description: Specifies the mode of VM Guest Patching for the Virtual Machine.

patch_mode.description: Specifies the mode of in-guest patching to this Windows Virtual Machine.

plan.type: list(object({name: string, product: string, publisher: string}))

platform_fault_domain.description: Specifies the Platform Fault Domain in which this Windows Virtual Machine should be created. Defaults to -1, which means this will be automatically assigned to a fault domain that best maintains balance across the available fault domains.

priority.description: Specifies the priority of this Virtual Machine.

provision_vm_agent.description: Should the Azure VM Agent be provisioned on this Virtual Machine?

proximity_placement_group_id.description: The ID of the Proximity Placement Group which the Virtual Machine should be assigned to.

reboot_setting.description: Specifies the reboot setting for platform scheduled patching.

secret.type: list(object({key_vault_id: string, certificate: list(object({store: string, url: string}))}))

secure_boot_enabled.description: Specifies if Secure Boot and Trusted Launch is enabled for the Virtual Machine.

source_image_id.description: The ID of the Image which this Virtual Machine should be created from.

source_image_reference.type: list(object({publisher: string, offer: string, sku: string, version: string}))
source_image_reference.description: A source_image_reference block as defined below.

tags.description: A mapping of tags which should be assigned to this Virtual Machine.

termination_notification.description: A os_image_notification block as defined below.

timezone.description: Specifies the Time Zone which should be used by the Virtual Machine.

user_data.description: The Base64-Encoded User Data which should be used for this Virtual Machine.

virtual_machine_scale_set_id.description: Specifies the Orchestrated Virtual Machine Scale Set that this Virtual Machine should be created within.

vm_agent_platform_updates_enabled.description: Specifies whether VMAgent Platform Updates is enabled.

vtpm_enabled.description: Specifies if vTPM (virtual Trusted Platform Module) and Trusted Launch is enabled for the Virtual Machine.

zone.description: Specifies the Availability Zone in which this Windows Virtual Machine should be located.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
